activities_projects.title: Main Characters Identification
activities_projects.objective: Identify the main characters in the play
steps: Read the play carefully
List the main characters
Write one sentence about each character
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Identifies characters and their roles in the play

activities_projects.title: Character Traits of Gerrard
steps: Read Gerrard’s dialogues
Write 4–5 lines describing his personality
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises intelligence and courage in characters

activities_projects.title: Intruder’s Plan
activities_projects.objective: Understand the intention of the intruder
steps: Identify why the intruder entered Gerrard’s house
Write the plan of the intruder in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the conflict in the play
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct explanation of the intruder’s plan (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Setting of the Play
activities_projects.objective: Identify the place where the story happens
steps: Read the opening scene description
Write 3 sentences describing Gerrard’s cottage
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands the setting of the play
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear description of the setting (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Sequence of Events
steps: Identify four important events in the play
Write them in the correct order

activities_projects.title: How Gerrard Escapes
activities_projects.objective: Understand how the hero outwits the intruder
steps: Read the final part of the play
Write 4–5 lines explaining how Gerrard traps the intruder
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands problem solving in the story

activities_projects.title: Vocabulary from the Lesson
steps: Find five new words from the lesson
Write their meanings
Use each word in a sentence
activities_projects.evaluation: Correct meaning and sentence usage (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Message of the Play
steps: Think about the lesson learnt from the play
Write the message in 3–4 sentences
activities_projects.evaluation: Clear explanation of the message (10 marks)

activities_projects.title: Dialogue Practice
steps: Select a short dialogue between Gerrard and the intruder
Practice reading it with a partner
Use correct tone and expression

activities_projects.title: Real-Life Connection
activities_projects.objective: Relate the play to real-life situations
steps: Think about situations where intelligence helps solve problems
Write 3–4 sentences connecting it to Gerrard’s actions
activities_projects.evaluation: Meaningful connection with the story (10 marks)
